title: AI-Native-Engineer
description: The AI-Native Engineer: Master AI-Assisted Workflows, Build RAG Architectures, and Deploy Enterprise Machine Learning Models
summary: This content describes the role of an AI-Native Engineer, focusing on mastering AI-assisted workflows, building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures, and deploying enterprise machine learning models. It emphasizes practical skills for integrating AI into professional engineering practices.
